sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27670" key="dixo/qumos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῐχό-θῡμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n27670.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wavering,</tr_> cj. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0631.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pittac.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope> </bibl> Bgk.</sense> </entryFree>
